purpose: Track Scene Editor modularisation cleanup and the readiness gate before wider cross-app linking work.
knownGoodState: The core split has been merged and deployed. PR #6 moved the editor core into permanent config, storage, scene-model, IO, stage-drag, renderer, bindings, core-api and app modules; scene-editor-v2.js is now a small bootstrap shell. The user opened the live v0.30-scene-core-split page after merge, confirmed it loads/restores the local scene and reported the editor seems fine after the requested live interaction check.

delivery.pullRequestTitle: Split Scene Editor core into modular files and archive legacy helpers

blockerRule: Two failed attempts means the item becomes blocked and moves to uploaded local file, agent/Codex, or proper local branch workflow. No placeholders, no patch-on-patch workaround, no manual reconstruction from truncated chunks.

tasks.title: Verify stable baseline before core split
tasks.description: The recovered v0.29 baseline loaded before refactoring and preserved the working scene and transform controls.

tasks.title: Extract Scene Editor config constants
tasks.description: scene-editor-config.js owns the version, storage keys, repo/app asset paths, template manifest path and type options. It now identifies the merged live build as v0.30-scene-core-split.

tasks.title: Extract local storage helpers
tasks.description: scene-editor-storage.js is consumed by scene-editor-app.js for settings, working copy and download-stamp read/write while preserving the existing localStorage keys.

tasks.title: Extract scene model helpers
tasks.description: scene-editor-scene-model.js owns blank scene creation, collection/item lookup, background path mutation, normalisation, default item creation, duplicate/remove and path data mutations without an unsafe early dependency on the core API.

tasks.title: Extract import/export IO
tasks.description: scene-editor-io.js owns local JSON import, URL import, template manifest/template loading and JSON download without changing the existing loose JSON contract.

tasks.title: Extract core move-drag controller
tasks.description: scene-editor-stage-drag.js owns the core centre/move-handle pointer lifecycle and coordinates with the retained transform and offscreen-placement modules.

tasks.title: Extract renderer and markup helpers
tasks.description: scene-editor-renderer.js owns shell, stage/work area, controls, cards, context menu, template modal and file/resume markup while retaining the IDs/classes used by active helper modules.

tasks.title: Extract DOM bindings
tasks.description: scene-editor-bindings.js owns import/template/file/path/form/context/stage/zoom event wiring while preserving existing behaviour.

tasks.title: Extract app coordinator and public core API
tasks.description: scene-editor-app.js coordinates the modular app and scene-editor-core-api.js preserves window.ArtifexSceneEditorCore compatibility for active helper modules. scene-editor-v2.js is now only the bootstrap shell.

tasks.title: Rename and normalise retained active runtime helper modules
tasks.description: Codex audited but deliberately retained the remaining numbered live helper modules during the core split. A final low-risk runtime cleanup pass should rename them to permanent ownership-based module names, update index.html/cache keys, and remove stale helper build messages without changing behaviour.
tasks.observedIssue: The live v0.30 page still displays the stale toast text 'v0.28-consolidation: Consolidated layout helper loaded'. The stale VERSION constant is present in both scene-editor-v11-helper.js and scene-editor-v15-helper.js.
tasks.bestWorkflow: Codex full-file rename/test/PR workflow; do not perform live-module rename via truncated connector copying.

tasks.title: Confirm Scene Editor is ready for cross-app linking
tasks.description: The core API bridge now exists, but cross-app scene/screen/object/effect linking and active-project adoption were not implemented in the core cleanup pass. Complete the retained runtime-module cleanup first, then begin this integration work.

tasks.title: Archive unused legacy Scene Editor files
tasks.description: Archived unused unreferenced legacy files into archive/legacy-2026-05-28 after confirming index.html active load list and active-code references.

testsExecuted: Codex: node --check for active Scene Editor/shared JS files
Codex: HTTP index and active CSS/JS asset checks via Vite at 127.0.0.1:5173
Codex: temporary Playwright smoke test for render/import menu/local backup/object selection/value fields/zoom/manual local save/core API
User: opened deployed GitHub Pages v0.30-scene-core-split page after PR #6 merge and confirmed the editor appears functional after the requested interaction check
nextStep: Use Codex for one final Scene Editor runtime-module cleanup PR: rename retained numbered live modules to permanent module names, remove stale v0.28 helper toasts/version strings, cache-bust consistently (recommended v0.31-runtime-module-cleanup), run served/static/Playwright tests, then obtain user live verification. After that begin cross-app active-project/reference integration.
